Annihilape

#0978 Tatsugiri #0980 Clodsire
  • Contents
  • Info
  • Base stats
  • Evolution chart
  • Pokédex entries
  • Moves learned
  • Sprites
  • Locations
  • Language

Annihilape is a Fighting/Ghost type Pokémon introduced in Generation 9.

Evolution of Primeape.

Annihilape

Pokédex data

National № 0979
Type Fighting Ghost
Species Rage Monkey Pokémon
Height 1.2 m (3′11″)
Weight 56.0 kg (123.5 lbs)
Abilities 1. Vital Spirit
2. Inner Focus
Defiant (hidden ability)
Local № 0160 (Scarlet/Violet)
0101 (The Teal Mask)
0003 (Mega Dimension)

Training

EV yield 3 Attack
Catch rate 45 (5.9% with PokéBall, full HP)
Base Friendship 50 (normal)
Base Exp. 268
Growth Rate Medium Fast

Breeding

Egg Groups Field
Gender 50% male, 50% female
Egg cycles 20 (4,884–5,140 steps)

Base stats

HP 110
330 424
Attack 115
211 361
Defense 80
148 284
Sp. Atk 50
94 218
Sp. Def 90
166 306
Speed 90
166 306
Total 535 Min Max

The ranges shown on the right are for a level 100 Pokémon. Maximum values are based on a beneficial nature, 252 EVs, 31 IVs; minimum values are based on a hindering nature, 0 EVs, 0 IVs.

Evolution chart

#0056
Mankey
Fighting
(Level 28)
#0057
Primeape
Fighting
(Use Rage Fist 20 times)
#0979
Annihilape
Fighting · Ghost

Pokédex entries

Scarlet When its anger rose beyond a critical point, this Pokémon gained power that is unfettered by the limits of its physical body.
Violet It imbues its fists with the power of the rage that it kept hidden in its heart. Opponents struck by these imbued fists will be shattered to their core.

Legends: Z-A Scarlet/Violet

Name origin

annihilate
destroy, obliterate
ape
a species of primate
